name: Triple Cheese Burgers
recipeInstructions:
1. Use either Mozzarella or Swiss cheese slices. Each slice should be 3 X 3 inches square.
2. Mix the meat, bread crumbs, onion, egg, and seasonings together.
3. Shape the mixture into 12 thin patties, each about 4-inches in diameter.
4. Top each of the six patties with 1 tablespoon of cottage cheese, spreading to within 1/2-inch of the edge.
5. Sprinkle on 2 teaspoons of Parmesan cheese and top each patty with one of the remaining patties, sealing the edges firmly.
6. Brown the patties in a large skillet over medium-high heat, turning once.
7. Drain off the fat and pour the tomato sauce over the patties.
8. Cover and simmer for about 15 minutes.
9. Place a cheese slice on each patty, cover, and heat until the cheese is melted, about 2 minutes.
10. Serve with the remaining sauce in the skillet poured over them.
